query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('product_profiles', 'product_variants', 'product_todos', 'product_logs', 'keyword_monitors', 'keyword_snapshots');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Vy724JxA6DGk2d.root --database a79tkwusxJ5HWpLxCXSSXN --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('product_profiles', 'product_variants', 'product_todos', 'product_logs', 'keyword_monitors', 'keyword_snapshots');
